claims.claim: A method comprising step 1 of processing data through a neural network layer with 35 parameters and backpropagation.
A method comprising step 2 of processing data through a neural network layer with 769 parameters and backpropagation.
A method comprising step 3 of processing data through a neural network layer with 291 parameters and backpropagation.
